body:
## Problem

The `/compare/<slug>` gear comparison pages (tama-vs-pearl, zildjian-vs-meinl, etc.) have SSR meta + BreadcrumbList (from #1409, approved) but **no `articleSchema`** (no FAQPage, no Article, no Product schema). These are high purchase-intent pages targeting queries like "tama vs pearl drums for metal" or "zildjian vs meinl cymbals" — adding FAQPage gives AI Overview eligibility.

Confirmed in `api/meta/[...path].js` (gearCompareMatch handler): returns `breadcrumbSchema` array only, no `articleSchema`.

## Files to touch

- `api/meta/[...path].js` — `gearCompareMatch` handler (search for gearCompareMatch)

## Template

The slug pattern is `<brand1>-vs-<brand2>` — parse both brands from the slug:

```js
const [brand1, brand2] = slug.split('-vs-').map(b => 
  b.split('-').map(w => w.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + w.slice(1)).join(' ')
);

articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@graph': [
    {
      '@type': 'Article',
      headline: `${brand1} vs ${brand2} — Drum Gear Comparison`,
      description: `Side-by-side comparison of ${brand1} and ${brand2} for metal drumming.`,
      url: `${BASE_URL}/compare/${slug}`,
      publisher: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
      author: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge' },
      about: [
        { '@type': 'Product', name: brand1 },
        { '@type': 'Product', name: brand2 },
      ],
    },
    {
      '@type': 'FAQPage',
      mainEntity: [
        {
          '@type': 'Question',
          name: `Is ${brand1} or ${brand2} better for metal drumming?`,
          acceptedAnswer: {
            '@type': 'Answer',
            text: `Both ${brand1} and ${brand2} are used by professional metal drummers. The choice depends on playing style, budget, and personal preference. See our full comparison at metalforge.io/compare/${slug}.`,
          },
        },
        {
          '@type': 'Question',
          name: `Which pro metal drummers use ${brand1} vs ${brand2}?`,
          acceptedAnswer: {
            '@type': 'Answer',
            text: `Many top metal drummers prefer ${brand1} while others choose ${brand2}. MetalForge tracks gear used by 60+ pro metal drummers — see the full breakdown at metalforge.io/compare/${slug}.`,
          },
        },
        {
          '@type': 'Question',
          name: `What is the price difference between ${brand1} and ${brand2}?`,
          acceptedAnswer: {
            '@type': 'Answer',
            text: `Prices vary by product line and configuration. MetalForge's ${brand1} vs ${brand2} comparison page shows current pricing and pro-endorsed models side by side.`,
          },
        },
      ],
    },
  ],
}),
```

## Pages (~7 gear comparisons)

All slugs from `gearComparisons` array (tama-vs-pearl, zildjian-vs-meinl, etc.)

## Quality gate

- ≥3 Q&A per FAQPage
- Article schema has headline and publisher
- BreadcrumbList from existing breadcrumbSchema remains (no regression)
- Schema validates via Google Rich Results Test

## Estimated organic uplift

- AI Overview eligibility for "[brand1] vs [brand2] drums" comparison queries (high purchase intent)
- Article rich snippet eligibility
- Targets a distinct query intent not covered by drummer comparison (/vs/) pages

## Verify

1. Google Rich Results Test on /compare/tama-vs-pearl → FAQPage + Article both valid
2. `curl -s 'https://metalforge.io/api/meta/compare/tama-vs-pearl' | grep FAQPage` → non-empty
3. GSC: impressions for "[brand1] vs [brand2] drums" within 3 weeks
4. BreadcrumbList still present (breadcrumbSchema unchanged)
5. Check gearComparisons data source file for exact slug list

## Done

When all `/compare/<slug>` handlers return `articleSchema` with Article + FAQPage in SSR.
title: SEO batch: /compare/<slug> gear comparison pages — add FAQPage JSON-LD for AI Overview eligibility (~7 pages)
